name: gemini_pro_tts
description: Generate high-quality speech using Gemini Pro TTS with 30 premium voices. Superior quality to OpenAI TTS. Supports emotional cues in text. Returns task_id (async).

text.description: Text to convert to speech. Include emotional cues inline (e.g. 'said with determination', 'whispered nervously').

voice.description: Voice name: Zephyr, Puck, Charon, Kore, Fenrir, Leda, Orus, Aoede, and 22 more (default: Charon)

returns: task_id (string) for async status tracking via get_task_status
notes: Async operation - use get_task_status to check progress.
